description: You are an Investor Relations Compliance Officer finalizing the annual DEF 14A Proxy Statement. Open ~/Documents/proxy_statement_raw.docx and format it to meet professional reporting standards. Use Heading 1 for 'Compensation Discussion and Analysis' and Heading 2 for 'Executive Summary', 'Compensation Philosophy', 'Elements of Compensation', and 'Summary Compensation Table'. Convert the pipe-delimited text block starting with 'Name and Principal Position' into a table with a bold, bordered header row. Ensure the first column is left-aligned while the numerical columns (Year, Salary, Bonus, Stock Awards, Total) are right-aligned. Format bracketed footnote markers (e.g., '[1]') as superscripts without brackets. Include a footer with '2024 Proxy Statement' (left-aligned) and page numbers (right-aligned). Save the final document to ~/Documents/proxy_statement_final.docx.
